title: CMCDv2 Custom Keys Registry
description: Schema for the machine-readable list of registered CMCDv2 custom keys.

key.description: Full key name (reverseDNS.namespace-field). Must contain both namespace and field; namespace-only keys are not allowed.

namespace.description: Namespace segment for grouping; optional in JSON but required in key format.

field.description: Field segment; optional in JSON but required in key format.

description.description: Short, clear purpose of the key.

valueType.description: CMCD custom key value type: STRING or TOKEN only (per spec). Values MUST be at most 64 characters.

headerName.description: Header name per CTA-5004-A Section 3.1 (Header field definition).

example.description: Optional example value (max 64 characters per CMCD spec).

added.description: Date the key was added to the registry (YYYY-MM-DD).

source.description: Optional link to the GitHub issue or discussion.
